AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUZ,  STAN AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, JIN KIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SONG, JIN KIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GUZ,  STAN PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
